subcodes.first_line: O My companion! From the day the Ancient Ocean commenced its mighty effusion and successive surging, the waves of bounties reached the shore [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انیسا بحر قدم فیضان اعظم و طوفان دمادم باشلدیغی گوندن امواج فیوضات ساحل
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
